name: Suite — Shape Coverage Smoke (Phase 7a 8-shape classifier)
description: Two or three questions per shape so the user can verify the deterministic prompt-shape classifier puts each example in the right bucket. Also covers the regression surface introduced by Phases 1-6 (single-source settings, de-hardcoded compiler, dropped-filter warnings, IConversationPersister). Mix of EN and AR.

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS [Count] FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: count of open tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS [Count] FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: top 5 tickets by creation date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: highest priority tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: أعلى 10 تكتات حسب تاريخ الإنشاء
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: average resolution time for tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(DATEDIFF(hour, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt)) AS [AvgHours] FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created by month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS [Month], COUNT(*) AS [Count] FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY [Month]

Scenarios.Question: tickets this month vs last month
compare open tickets to closed tickets
details of TCK-2026-00050
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title, Description, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE TicketNumber = 'TCK-2026-00050' AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: what is the status of TCK-2026-00001
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, s.Name AS [Status] FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.TicketNumber = 'TCK-2026-00001' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with critical priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: التكتات المفتوحة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0
